Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: First I need to make sure I clearly separate Part 1 normative violations hard rules and Part 2 desiderata soft issues then also do the interpretations part as asked

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: First lets go through each case one by one starting with normative violations first

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 first Lets check its sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Credit Check before Risk Assessment Yes Risk Assessment before Loan Decision yes Inform after Loan Decision yes Approved so Finalize before Close yes No rejected steps no skipped steps

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So Case 1 is fully compliant with normative rules

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now Case 2 Lets look at its events First Application Received then next activity is Risk Assessment Oh right no Credit Check before that

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thats a violation Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Then after that Credit Check is after Risk Assessment so thats out of order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then Loan Decision is Rejected Then next is Finalize Documentation the rule says if loan is rejected do not finalize documentation before closing So thats a big violation

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait Inform Applicant Wait hold on Case 2s events after Loan Decision Rejected the next activity is Finalize Documentation then Close Case Oh theres no Inform Applicant step at all

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome So regardless of approve or reject you have to inform the applicant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So Case 2 skips Inform Applicant thats another violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait but lets hold that thought and do Case 3 first for normative

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3s sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Credit Check before Risk Assessment yes Risk before Loan Decision yes Inform after Loan Decision yes Approved so Finalize before Close yes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So Case 3 has no normative violations The timing is late but thats desiderata not normative

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Wait so now normative violations only Case 2

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets list all its issues against normative rules Risk Assessment precedes Credit Check mandatory Inform Applicant is omitted entirely Finalize Documentation is performed after a Rejected decision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Now Part 2 Desiderata failures Desiderata are Credit Check within 24h of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48h of Loan Decision Follow up Call before closing

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Credit Check at 0930 same day thats within 24h Loan Decision at 1100 Inform Applicant at 1300 same day thats within 48h no Follow up Call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So Case 1 fails the desideratum of having a Follow up Call but meets the timing ones

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Credit Check is at 0900 Application Received at 0800 thats 1 hour within 24h no Inform Applicant so we cannot check the Inform timing desideratum also no Follow up Call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 main issues are normative but desiderata timing of Credit Check is good and Follow up Call is missing

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Application Received at 2024 01 12 0900 Credit Check at 2024 01 14 1000 thats 49 hours

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So thats more than 24 hours and a desideratum violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Loan Decision at 2024 01 14 1200 Inform Applicant at 2024 01 16 1500 thats 51 hours

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So thats more than 48 hours after loan decision another desideratum violation Also no Follow up Call so thats a third desideratum violation for Case 3

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 fails only the Follow up Call recommendation Case 2 fails Follow up Call and has normative issues Case 3 fails three desiderata

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now the third part suggest interpretations or justifications for observed behaviors

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Case 2 out of order Credit Check and Risk Assessment maybe there was a data entry error or the application was flagged as high priority leading to a preliminary review before the formal Credit Check was logged

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Case 2 missing Inform Applicant and improper Finalize Documentation maybe there was a system error where the rejection decision was incorrectly logged as Approved in the system and the notification step was skipped due to an outage

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Case 1 missing Follow up Call maybe the loan was low risk and all details were already confirmed during application so the team determined a follow up call was unnecessary

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Case 3 delayed Credit Check the application was received on Friday and the credit check team may have been unavailable over the weekend leading to the delay

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Case 3 delayed Inform Applicant the decision was made on Sunday and the customer communication team may have been off duty with a backlog delaying notification

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Case 3 missing Follow up Call the team may have considered earlier exchanges with the applicant sufficient to align all parties
